series_metadata.series_title: Securities Lending Total Average Portfolio (TAP) Verification
series_metadata.series_description: Each month, the Trust department calculates the 12 month rolling average balance for each of the Regular and Structured accounts. This record series includes the results of the calculations as well as the relevant supporting documentation. These calculations are required to ascertain compliance with investment policies.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years
